title: Cardiac Diagnostics II
description: Advanced cardiac imaging and monitoring: echocardiography (TTE and TEE), Doppler, stress echo, and hemodynamic assessment.

lessons.title: Echocardiography
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.1 — Physics of ultrasound, 2-D views (parasternal, apical, subcostal, suprasternal), M-Mode, Doppler and color flow imaging, contrast studies, stress echocardiography, and transesophageal echocardiogram (TEE).

audio.title: How Sound Waves Map the Heart

resources.title: Color Flow Doppler Echocardiography (video)
resources.description: Demonstration of color flow Doppler imaging and the BART color convention.

resources.title: Bubble Study / Contrast Echocardiography (video)
resources.description: Agitated saline injection used to identify intracardiac shunts and patent foramen ovale.

resources.title: Stress Echocardiography (video)
resources.description: Overview of exercise and pharmacologic stress echocardiography for evaluating myocardial ischemia.
